evals.prompt: How should I use email tracking data to decide when to follow up?
evals.expected_output: Framework for interpreting engagement signals and timing follow-ups based on opens, clicks, and attachment views.

assertions.name: signal_framework
assertions.description: Must provide a signal-to-action mapping (single open vs multiple opens vs click vs attachment view → different follow-up actions)

assertions.name: timing_guidance
assertions.description: Must recommend specific timing windows for follow-up based on engagement type (e.g., call within 30 min of link click)

assertions.name: accuracy_caveats
assertions.description: Must warn about Apple MPP and bot clicks making open/click data unreliable and recommend reply rate as most reliable

evals.prompt: My email open rate shows 95% but I'm getting almost no replies. What's going on?
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis of inflated open rates due to Apple MPP and recommendations for better engagement metrics.

assertions.name: mpp_diagnosis
assertions.description: Must identify Apple Mail Privacy Protection as the likely cause of inflated open rates

assertions.name: alternative_metrics
assertions.description: Must recommend focusing on click-through rate and reply rate as more reliable engagement metrics

assertions.name: content_advice
assertions.description: Must also address that low reply rate may indicate weak email content, CTA, or personalization regardless of tracking issues

evals.prompt: Set up email tracking in Yesware for my sales team
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step Yesware email tracking setup with notification configuration and team reporting.

assertions.name: yesware_setup
assertions.description: Must provide Yesware-specific tracking setup steps including extension install and notification preferences

assertions.name: attachment_tracking
assertions.description: Must explain Yesware attachment tracking for documents and presentations

assertions.name: team_reporting
assertions.description: Must cover team-level engagement reports and recipient engagement reports (Premium+ plans)
